name: Treant Protector
description: Life becomes death becomes new life. As it should be.

abilities.name: Nature's Guise
abilities.description: Grants bonus movement speed and tree-walking when near trees. Reduces cooldown by a flat amount per hero level. Tree Search Radius: 200. Damage Threshold: 0. Move Speed Bonus: 10%. Invisibility Linger Duration: 2. Guise Cooldown Reduction per Hero Level: 1. Mana Cost: 35.

abilities.name: Nature's Grasp
abilities.description: Creates vines towards the target location. Vines slow down and deal damage to enemy units that walk through. Cast Range: 1500. Max Vines Length: 1500. Vines Radius: 135. Damage per Second: 35/50/65/80 (60/75/90/105). Move Speed Slow: 25%/30%/35%/40%. Vines Duration: 9/10/11/12. Cooldown: 20/19/18/17. Mana Cost: 90.

abilities.name: Leech Seed
abilities.description: A successful attack now deals spell damage bonus and binds the enemy unit. The heal component is less effective on allied creeps. Cast Range: 150. Spell Damage Bonus: 20/40/60/80 (100/120/140/160). Bind Duration: 0.9/1.1/1.3/1.5. Heal Radius: 650. Max Heal Targets: 5. Pulse Upon Attack: 1. Cooldown: 15/12/9/6.

abilities.name: Living Armor
abilities.description: Applies a buff that negates all damage types from all player-controlled sources. The damage negation value reduces per damage instance negated, and removes the buff entirely once the damage negated value reaches nil. The roots and tendrils of the Treant Protectors are far-reaching, stimulating the growth and rejuvenation of all of nature. Cast Range: Global. Number of Instances: 4/4/5/6 (4/5/6/7). Damage Negation Threshold: 20. Damage Negated: 120 (140). Value Reduction per Damage Instance Negated: 35/30/25/20. Duration: 12. Cooldown: 24/21/18/15. Mana Cost: 40/45/50/55.

abilities.name: Eyes In The Forest
abilities.description: Enchants a tree, which grants Treant unobstructed vision in that location. Cast Range: 350. Vision Radius: 800. Hit Count: 2. Duration: 300. Flying Vision Radius: 800. Mana Cost: 55.

abilities.name: Overgrowth
abilities.description: Deals damage per second and binds all debuff-affected enemy units within the radius. Grants Treant phase movement, becomes unslowable with a fixed movement speed for the duration. Additionally grants self bonus strength and a splash attack. Reduces cooldown. Radius: 800. Damage per Second: 95. Bind Duration: 3/4/5. Strength Factor: 2. Splash Radius: 300. Splash Damage: 60%. Cooldown: 110/100/90. Mana Cost: 200/250/300.
